evals.name: quick-cosmetic-change
evals.prompt: change the primary button color from blue to green

evals.name: simple-bug-fix
evals.prompt: the search field gets hidden behind the keyboard on mobile
assertions: Regression test written for this specific bug
Root cause scan performed (grep for similar pattern)

evals.name: new-feature
evals.prompt: add a dark mode toggle to the settings page
assertions: Tests cover on, off, and persistence
Guardrails for edge cases (system preference, storage failure)

evals.name: refactor
evals.prompt: convert the auth service from class components to hooks
assertions: Scope drift check: only auth files changed

evals.name: security-fix-with-guard-loop
evals.prompt: the login endpoint might be vulnerable to SQL injection
assertions: SQL injection fixed with parameterized queries
Root cause scan: all other SQL queries checked for same pattern
Guardrail test: test that raw SQL concat is caught/prevented
Every audit finding has a corresponding guardrail
Every guardrail has a corresponding test

evals.name: audit-finding-gets-guarded
evals.prompt: fix the timeout error in the data fetch function
evals.project_setup: Function with timeout bug AND a hidden XSS vulnerability in adjacent component using dangerouslySetInnerHTML
assertions: Original timeout bug fixed with guardrail and test
XSS fix applied with full guard-test-verify loop
XSS guardrail added (input sanitization or CSP)
XSS guardrail test written and passes
Root cause scan for XSS pattern in codebase
Change summary lists both original fix and audit finding

evals.name: no-tooling-project
evals.prompt: fix the divide by zero error in the calculate function
evals.project_setup: Plain JS files, no package.json, no tests, no linter
assertions: Pipeline not blocked by missing tooling
Guardrail added (type check or validation before division)
Suggestion to set up test framework

evals.name: user-override-quick-to-full
evals.prompt: change the error message text but do the full lifecycle please
assertions: Full mode executed despite low risk

evals.name: circuit-breaker-test
evals.prompt: optimize the sorting algorithm in the data processor
evals.project_setup: App where the sorting function has a side effect relied on by another module. Optimizing the sort will break the dependent module.
assertions: Audit finds the optimization breaks a dependent module
Issue noted as deferred in change summary
Other fixes and guardrails still in place
Pipeline does not enter infinite fix-break loop

evals.name: root-cause-pattern-scan
evals.prompt: fix the null pointer crash in the user profile page
evals.project_setup: App with 3 other components that have the same missing null check pattern as the reported bug
assertions: Original null check added and guarded
Root cause scan finds same pattern in 3 other locations
Guardrail added for null check pattern (type narrowing or utility)
